sys_update_xml.name: sysevent_email_action_3a027d2298b332107f44ab4eb33b8bb1
sys_update_xml.payload:
truetruetruec97d83137f4432005f58108c3ffa917aincidentpriority=1^active=true^service_offering=7e845b6dc17332107f442963ae1ebdd4^EQtext/html 

 

]]>falsefalseactivate.life.cycle.migrationfalsefalsefalsefalseenginefalseevent.parm1falseCritical Incident ${URI_REF} has been created for Infinity (HHD) service offering.

]]>P1 HHD Incidentfalse100falsebusiness_service.owned_by,service_offering.owned_byefe453adc17332107f442963ae1ebd73true
